Name: LOCATION_ITEM_BARCODE_PICK
Description:
PICKING

If you need a system where users scan both the Location and MasterItem to identify the stock, thereby eliminating the need to print Tracking Entity barcodes. This process will use the barcode format of [LocationBarcode]_[MasterItemCode] to find the TrackingEntity.

This is one of potentially several processes you'll need to implement. All processes prefixed with LOCATION_ITEM_BARCODE_* are part of this implementation.\n\nThe location step is defaulted to LocationBarcode OR LocationName = 'DIS', the post script will insert Location if not exists.
Author: James Davidson
